# Copilot Instructions

- This is a docs-only repository for engineering agent instructions and workflow templates.
- Keep edits small, focused, and easy to review.
- Preserve role-agent clarity: each agent should have a clear purpose, responsibilities, non-goals, review criteria, and output expectations.
- Do not add implementation code, package manager files, dependencies, build tooling, generated artifacts, or CI.
- Preserve public OSS hygiene by avoiding private links, local paths, generated-by signatures, private tool metadata, and internal-only notes.
